title: Danantara to Eventually Oversee Entire SOE Portfolio, CEO Rosan Says

body: CEO Rosan Roeslani denies reports of Danantara eventually consolidating the $10.5 billion INA under its wings.

body: Indonesia is eyeing its shadow economy potential to boost tax ratio to be on par with fellow ASEAN member Cambodia.

body: Bank Indonesia keeps benchmark rate at 5.75% to control inflation and stabilize the rupiah amid global economic uncertainty.

title: Indonesia Retains Trade Surplus Run for 57th Consecutive Month
